---
title: "Notes"
---

## all delivery types

- package
- service work
- food delivery
- grocery delivery
- delivery outside home
- delivery at office

## meeting notes

### 5/19/2026

- combine `deliver_elsewhere` and `deliver_office` for larger samples
- residence type: 
  - combine single and townhouse for similar delivery approaches
  - use over-the-year trend charts: apartment package grew since COVID-19 when new delivery infrastructure were built within apartment complexes
- find potential variables to distinguish urban and rural areas
- test more categorical variables in the binomial logit model
